bloclawd dry-run - group 10000000... - 1 model

Limit card: codex / max20 / NA / 5h
Paste the block below into https://bloclawd.com/rank

Model token mix
+------------------------+--------------+---------------+-------------------------+---------------------------+---------------------------+---------------------+-------------------------+
| model                  | input_tokens | output_tokens | cache_read_input_tokens | ephemeral_5m_input_tokens | ephemeral_1h_input_tokens | cached_input_tokens | reasoning_output_tokens |
+------------------------+--------------+---------------+-------------------------+---------------------------+---------------------------+---------------------+-------------------------+
| gpt-5.5                |          500 |            75 |                       0 |                         0 |                         0 |                  48 |                      15 |
+------------------------+--------------+---------------+-------------------------+---------------------------+---------------------------+---------------------+-------------------------+

--- bloclawd rank input ---
{
    "bloclawd_rank_v": 1,
    "harness": "codex",
    "limit_type": "5h",
    "models": [
        {
            "model": "gpt-5.5",
            "tokens": {
                "cached_input_tokens": 48,
                "input_tokens": 500,
                "output_tokens": 75,
                "reasoning_output_tokens": 15
            }
        }
    ],
    "region": "NA",
    "tier": "max20"
}
--- end bloclawd rank input ---
